summary: OpenNori self decisions now record reviewable candidates for protocol-state validation, editable Markdown parsing, and CLI subcommand surface, including current project state, Node standard library boundaries, official SDK applicability, mature MIT npm candidates, and self-build limits where applicable.

sources.label: npm view ajv zod valibot micromark commander citty cac version license description repository.url --json
sources.command: npm view ajv zod valibot micromark commander citty cac version license description repository.url --json

reviewability: Open the listed decision files and verify each includes current_project, standard_library, official_sdk, open_source, recommendation, and self_build_reason when recommendation is self-build.
limitations: The npm candidate versions are a point-in-time check on 2026-06-12 and should be refreshed before adding dependencies. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.
